channel.title: NZ Family Travel — Tips & Guides
channel.description: Honest travel guides, itineraries and tips for families visiting New Zealand.

item.title: Best Auckland Day Trips for Families — Within 2 Hours
item.description: Find top Auckland family day trips within 2 hours, featuring Waiheke Island, Waitomo & more, plan your next holiday now

item.title: Bay of Islands with Kids — Family Activities Guide 2026
item.description: Best things to do in the Bay of Islands with kids — dolphins, Waitangi Treaty Grounds, Hole in the Rock, beaches, and what works by age. Honest NZ family guide.

item.title: Best NZ Holiday Parks for Families 2026 — Real Prices
item.description: The best family holiday parks in New Zealand — from Queenstown to Bay of Islands. Real prices, what facilities actually matter with kids, and which parks are worth the price.

item.title: Best NZ Beach Holidays for Families 2026 — Where to Go
item.description: Best beach holidays in NZ for families in 2026. Top beaches for kids, safest swimming, most family-friendly coastal towns, and when to visit each region.

item.title: NZ Campervan vs Hotel for Families — Which Saves Money? 2026
item.description: Campervan vs hotel for NZ family holidays: full cost breakdown, which is actually cheaper, what works for different ages, and when campervans save you money vs hotels.

item.title: Camping in NZ with Kids — Complete Guide 2026
item.description: Camping in NZ with kids in 2026. Best campsites, DOC campgrounds, freedom camping rules, what to bring, and how to make it work with children of all ages.

item.title: First Family Trip to New Zealand — Planning Guide 2026
item.description: Planning your first family trip to New Zealand in 2026? Everything you need to know — best time to visit, where to go, how long, what to expect, and common mistakes.

item.title: Free Things to Do in Auckland with Kids — 2026 Guide
item.description: Best free things to do in Auckland with kids — beaches, parks, markets, free museums, and local secrets. Honest guide for NZ families and visitors on a budget.

item.title: Is New Zealand Expensive for Families? — Honest 2026 Answer
item.description: Is New Zealand expensive for a family holiday in 2026? Honest answer covering accommodation, activities, food, and how NZ compares to other destinations.

item.title: Jucy vs Britz Campervan — NZ Family Comparison 2026
item.description: Jucy vs Britz campervan for NZ families: price, fleet age, size, and which is actually better for kids. Honest comparison with real costs. Updated May 2026.

item.title: North vs South Island for Families — Which to Choose?
item.description: Compare North & South Island family holidays for best activities, drive times & costs, plan your dream trip now

item.title: NZ Campervan Guide for Families — Complete Hire Guide 2026
item.description: Complete guide to hiring a campervan in NZ with kids. Which company, which van, costs, freedom camping, and tips from families who've done it.

item.title: NZ Family Campervan Honest Review — Is It Worth It?
item.description: Honest review of campervanning in NZ with kids in 2026. The good, the bad, best ages, best companies, real costs, and whether it's worth it for your family.

item.title: NZ Family Bucket List — 50 Things to Do with Kids
item.description: 50 must-do NZ family experiences — from glowworm caves to hot water beaches, luge runs, whale watching, and epic road trips. How many has your family ticked off?

item.title: How Much Does a NZ Family Holiday Cost? — 2026 Budget Guide
item.description: Honest cost breakdown for a NZ family holiday in 2026. Campervan vs hotel, activities, food, flights — full budget for a family of 4.

item.title: NZ in December with Kids — Weather, Crowds & Costs
item.description: Plan a stress-free NZ family holiday in December, expect warm weather, crowds and high costs, start planning now with our expert guide

item.title: NZ Family Travel Insurance Guide 2026 — What You Need
item.description: Do NZ families need travel insurance for domestic trips? What about overseas travel from NZ? Honest answers on what's covered, what isn't, and the cheapest way to get adequate cover.

item.title: NZ Holiday Parks Family Guide — TOP 10 vs Freedom Camping
item.description: Find top NZ holiday parks and freedom camping options, compare prices, and plan a stress-free family holiday, start planning now

item.title: NZ Holiday with a Baby (0–12 Months) — What Works 2026
item.description: Planning a New Zealand holiday with a baby? Honest guide to travelling NZ with 0–12 month olds — feeding, sleeping, driving, and the best baby-friendly destinations.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday in April — School Holidays & Autumn
item.description: NZ in April with kids: the autumn school holidays (including Easter) are the second busiest period. What works, what to book, and when April is actually better than summer.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday in December 2026 — What to Expect
item.description: NZ in December with kids: weather, crowds, prices, and which destinations are best. Early December is a hidden gem — real advice for NZ families.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday in February — The Smart Month to Visit
item.description: NZ in February with kids: why February is arguably the best month for NZ family travel — school holidays end, summer stays, prices drop, and crowds thin. Real advice.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday in January — Peak Season Guide 2026
item.description: NZ in January with kids: it is peak season but worth it. Real prices, crowd tips, and the best places to avoid the worst crowds while still having a great family trip.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday in June — Winter & Queen's Birthday
item.description: NZ in June with kids: ski season opens, Queen's Birthday long weekend, and the quietest tourist period of the year. Where to go and what to skip in winter NZ.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday in March 2026 — Autumn Starts, Crowds End
item.description: NZ in March with kids: still warm, far fewer crowds, and 20-30% cheaper than peak summer. Why March is one of the best-value months for NZ family travel.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday in May 2026 — Autumn Quiet Season Guide
item.description: NZ in May with kids: the quietest month of the year. What's still open, where to go, real weather data, and why May is one of the best-value months for NZ family travel.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday in November 2026 — Early Summer Sweet Spot
item.description: NZ in November with kids: the early summer sweet spot — summer weather, winter prices. Why November might be the smartest month to visit NZ with a family.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday in October 2026 — Spring at Its Best
item.description: NZ in October with kids: spring school holidays, blossoms, warm days, and prices still well below summer. The best month most NZ families don't think to book.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday in September — Spring School Holidays 2026
item.description: NZ in September with kids: spring arrives, lambs appear, and the September school holidays are the most underrated holiday period of the year. Here's why.

item.title: Best School Holiday Activities for Kids in NZ — 2026 Guide
item.description: Best school holiday activities for kids across NZ — by city, budget, age, and season. Free options, what books out fast, and how to avoid the holiday crowds.

item.title: NZ School Holiday Survival Guide for Parents — 2026
item.description: NZ school holiday survival guide for parents 2026. Activities, travel tips, booking timelines, and how to manage two weeks with bored kids without losing your mind.

item.title: NZ Summer Holidays with Kids — The Complete 2026/27 Guide
item.description: NZ summer holidays with kids 2026/27. Best destinations, activities, how to beat the crowds, what it costs, and tips for surviving Christmas and New Year with children in NZ.

item.title: NZ vs Bali for Families — Which Should You Choose in 2026?
item.description: NZ vs Bali for a family holiday in 2026. Honest comparison of cost, activities, safety, weather, food, and which destination suits which family.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday with a Baby — Complete Guide 2026
item.description: Travelling NZ with a baby? What's actually manageable, which destinations work best, car seat rules, breastfeeding culture, and how to not lose your mind. Honest guide from NZ parents.

item.title: New Zealand with Primary School Kids (5–10) — 2026 Guide
item.description: Planning a NZ holiday with kids aged 5–10? The best destinations, activities, itineraries and tips for New Zealand with primary school-aged children in 2026.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday with Teenagers — What Works 2026
item.description: NZ with teenagers: the activities that genuinely impress them, how to keep them engaged on road trips, best destinations for teens, and how to navigate the.

item.title: New Zealand with Toddlers — Complete Guide (1–4 Years)
item.description: Everything you need to plan a New Zealand holiday with toddlers. Best destinations, activities, driving tips, accommodation, and how to actually enjoy it.

item.title: NZ Family Holiday with Toddlers — Honest Guide 2026
item.description: NZ with toddlers: which destinations actually work, how to handle the drive times, the best toddler activities, and how to survive school holiday crowds. Real advice from NZ parents.

item.title: Queenstown vs Wanaka for Families — Which Should You Choose?
item.description: Queenstown vs Wanaka with kids — honest 2026 comparison of costs, activities, and family vibe. Which NZ destination is better for your family? ✓

item.title: Queenstown with Kids — Honest Cost Breakdown 2026
item.description: How much does Queenstown with kids cost in 2026? Honest budget breakdown for a family of 4 — accommodation, activities, food, and where to save money.

item.title: Rainy Day Activities for Kids in New Zealand — 2026 Guide
item.description: Best rainy day activities for kids across NZ — Auckland, Wellington, Rotorua, Queenstown, Christchurch. Free and paid indoor options with prices and honest reviews.

item.title: Rotorua vs Queenstown for Families — Which to Choose? (2026)
item.description: Rotorua vs Queenstown for families: honest comparison of costs, activities, ages, and what both destinations actually deliver. Which should you visit — or should you do both?

item.title: Rotorua with Kids — Honest Cost Breakdown 2026
item.description: How much does Rotorua with kids cost in 2026? Full budget breakdown for a family of 4 — geothermal, Māori culture, luge, and where to save money.

item.title: Skiing in NZ with Kids — Best Fields, Ages & Costs
item.description: Skiing in New Zealand with kids 2026. Best family ski fields, ages to start, costs, gear hire, lessons, and which resorts are most beginner-friendly.

item.title: Things to Do in Christchurch with Kids — 2026 Family Guide
item.description: Best things to do in Christchurch with kids — Antarctic Centre, Willowbank, gondola, punting, free parks. What works by age, what costs what, and what to skip.

item.title: Things to Do in Northland with Kids — 2026 Family Guide
item.description: Best things to do in Northland with kids — Bay of Islands, Whangarei Falls, Cape Reinga, 90 Mile Beach, kauri trees, and what works for families on the drive north.

item.title: Things to Do in Queenstown with Kids — 2026 Family Guide
item.description: Best things to do in Queenstown with kids — Skyline luge, Arrowtown, Kiwi Park, lake activities, skiing, and what actually works by age. Honest NZ family guide 2026.

item.title: Things to Do in Rotorua with Kids — 2026 Family Guide
item.description: Best things to do in Rotorua with kids — the luge, Wai-O-Tapu, Rainbow Springs, free thermal parks, and what actually works for different ages. Honest NZ family guide with prices.

item.title: Things to Do in Wanaka with Kids — 2026 Family Guide
item.description: Best things to do in Wanaka with kids — Puzzling World, lake swimming, Mt Iron walk, skiing, and what makes Wanaka better than Queenstown for some families.

item.title: Things to Do in Wellington with Kids — 2026 Family Guide
item.description: Best things to do in Wellington with kids — Te Papa (free), Zealandia, cable car, zoo, rainy day options, and what works by age. Honest 2026 NZ family guide.
